titleStmt.title: SII 8.535: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 535. (A.R. No. 236 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmate rāmāṉucāya nama[ḥ.*] cuvasti śrī . cālivākaṉac(ā)kāṟtam 1000 5 100 2 10 5- kku melcellāniṉṟa copakiṟutuvaruṣam vaiyācimātam pūṟuvapaṣamumpañcamiyum kuru vāramumpuṇarpūcanaṣattaramum peṟṟa ṉāḷ
śrīmatu rācātirāca rācaparamecura śrīvīrappiṟutāpa śrīvīraveṅkaṭapatitevamakārāyar peruṅkoṇṭaiyil reṟṟiṉa ciṅkācaṉātiruṭarāy piṟatirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṟkaiyil
tiruvallikkeṇi teḷḷiyaciṅkapperumāḷ śrīkāriyaturantararāṉa śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura koppūri Ōparācaiyatevamākārācāvum tāṉattārum tāṉacamaiyamum cilācācaṉam
paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi teḷḷiyaciṅkapperumāḷ tirukkoyil tirumaḻicaiyāḻvār tirupatuṣṭṭaikoṇṭaruḷukaiyil Avarukku niṟṟaipaṭi Amutu ceyyiṟattukku kākapūṟiṉa
taḷikaiyāka niṟṟaippaṭi Oru taḷikai Amutu ceyiṟattukkāka Aṉumañcipallai yemperumāṉār camaippitta keṭṭi ḷī 2 10 yinta varākaṉ Iruvatum tirukkoyili
le paṟṟikkoṇṭu niṟai taḷikai Oṉṟum Āḻvār tiruamutuceyiṟattukku Āka Aṉumañcaipallai Emperumāṉārācāriyar ciṣar ṉāṟaṇayaṅkār Āḻvār kayiṅkiriyattukkuāka
camaṟpit ṭutta yirupatu varākaṉum koyilile paṟṟikkoṇṭe nām Āḻvār Amutuceyiṟ taḷikai Oṉṟukku cilavu tāṉattārukku Iruṉāḻiyum paricālaka
ṉukku ṉāḻiyum cuyampākikku ṉāḻiyum tirumāltirumeṉikāval tiruvaniruva vīrāmaṉmuṉṉāḻiyum tiruviḷakku niṟṟai tirumālaiyum tācarinampi ṉāḻiyum Āka piṟucātam kuṟuṇiyum Āṟcantira
āṟkatāyiāka naṭattakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭikku cilācācaṉam paṇṇi poliveṭṭu poṭuvittom koppūri Ōpayatevamakārācāvum tāṉacamaiyamum [*]pippaṭi
yivarkaḷ coṉṉapaṭi poliveṭṭu Eḻutiṉa ka
cokkaṉācāri Eḻuttu yinta poliveṭṭu Ākacceyta keṭṭi � 2 10 Inta varākaṉ yirupatum Emperumāṉārācāriyar cīṣar ṉāṟaṇayaṅkārkaiyil paṟṟikkoṇṭom .
Digital edition of SII 8.535 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
